# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    /*
      Apply to all routes except:
      - Next.js internals
      - static files
      - auth pages + API auth endpoints (adjust as needed)
    */
    "/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|robots.txt|sitemap.xml|api/auth|login|signup).*)",
  ],
};

type AuthResult =
  | { ok: true; token: string }
  | { ok: false; reason: "missing" | "invalid" | "expired" };

const AUTH_COOKIE_NAMES = ["auth_token", "access_token", "token"] as const;

function getAuthTokenFromCookies(req: NextRequest): string | null {
  for (const name of AUTH_COOKIE_NAMES) {
    const v = req.cookies.get(name)?.value;
    if (v && v.trim()) return v.trim();
  }
  return null;
}

function base64UrlToUint8Array(input: string): Uint8Array {
  const pad = "=".repeat((4 - (input.length % 4)) % 4);
  const b64 = (input + pad).replace(/-/g, "+").replace(/_/g, "/");
  const raw = atob(b64);
  const out = new Uint8Array(raw.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < raw.length; i++) out[i] = raw.charCodeAt(i);
  return out;
}

function decodeJwtPayload(token: string): any | null {
  const parts = token.split(".");
  if (parts.length !== 3) return null;
  try {
    const payloadBytes = base64UrlToUint8Array(parts[1]);
    const payloadJson = new TextDecoder().decode(payloadBytes);
    return JSON.parse(payloadJson);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

function isExpired(payload: any, nowSeconds: number): boolean {
  const exp = payload?.exp;
  if (typeof exp !== "number") return false;
  return nowSeconds >= exp;
}

function isLikelyValidToken(token: string): AuthResult {
  // This middleware performs lightweight checks suitable for edge:
  // - token exists
  // - JWT format (optional)
  // - exp claim (if present)
  //
  // For full verification, validate signature in a dedicated auth service or Next.js API route.
  if (!token) return { ok: false, reason: "missing" };

  // Allow opaque tokens too; treat them as valid if they look non-trivial.
  const parts = token.split(".");
  if (parts.length === 3) {
    const payload = decodeJwtPayload(token);
    if (!payload) return { ok: false, reason: "invalid" };
    const nowSeconds = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
    if (isExpired(payload, nowSeconds)) return { ok: false, reason: "expired" };
    return { ok: true, token };
  }

  if (token.length < 16) return { ok: false, reason: "invalid" };
  return { ok: true, token };
}

function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  if (pathname === "/") return true;
  if (pathname.startsWith("/public")) return true;
  if (pathname.startsWith("/login")) return true;
  if (pathname.startsWith("/signup")) return true;
  if (pathname.startsWith("/api/public")) return true;
  return false;
}

function isAuthOnlyPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  if (pathname.startsWith("/app")) return true;
  if (pathname.startsWith("/dashboard")) return true;
  if (pathname.startsWith("/account")) return true;
  if (pathname.startsWith("/api/private")) return true;
  return false;
}

function isApiRequest(pathname: string): boolean {
  return pathname.startsWith("/api/");
}

function buildLoginRedirect(req: NextRequest): NextResponse {
  const url = req.nextUrl.clone();
  url.pathname = "/login";
  url.searchParams.set("next", req.nextUrl.pathname + req.nextUrl.search);
  return NextResponse.redirect(url);
}

function jsonUnauthorized(message = "Unauthorized"): NextResponse {
  return new NextResponse(JSON.stringify({ error: message }), {
    status: 401,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      "cache-control": "no-store",
    },
  });
}

function clearAuthCookies(res: NextResponse): void {
  for (const name of AUTH_COOKIE_NAMES) {
    res.cookies.set(name, "", { path: "/", maxAge: 0 });
  }
}

export default function middleware(req: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname } = req.nextUrl;

  // Always allow public paths (optionally redirect authenticated users away from /login)
  if (isPublicPath(pathname)) {
    if (pathname.startsWith("/login") || pathname.startsWith("/signup")) {
      const token = getAuthTokenFromCookies(req);
      const check = token ? isLikelyValidToken(token) : ({ ok: false, reason: "missing" } as const);
      if (check.ok) {
        const url = req.nextUrl.clone();
        url.pathname = "/app";
        return NextResponse.redirect(url);
      }
    }
    return NextResponse.next();
  }

  // For non-public paths, enforce auth only on selected prefixes
  const requiresAuth = isAuthOnlyPath(pathname);

  if (!requiresAuth) return NextResponse.next();

  const token = getAuthTokenFromCookies(req);
  const result = token ? isLikelyValidToken(token) : ({ ok: false, reason: "missing" } as const);

  if (result.ok) {
    const res = NextResponse.next();
    // Optionally forward token to backend via header (remove if not needed)
    res.headers.set("x-authenticated", "true");
    return res;
  }

  // If token present but invalid/expired, clear cookies
  if (result.reason === "invalid" || result.reason === "expired") {
    if (isApiRequest(pathname)) {
      const res = jsonUnauthorized(result.reason === "expired" ? "Token expired" : "Invalid token");
      clearAuthCookies(res);
      return res;
    }
    const res = buildLoginRedirect(req);
    clearAuthCookies(res);
    return res;
  }

  // Missing token
  if (isApiRequest(pathname)) return jsonUnauthorized("Missing auth token");
  return buildLoginRedirect(req);
}
